steps.title: Identify the slope of f(x)
steps.content: The function $f(x) = 2x + 3$ is in slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$. The slope is the coefficient of $x$, which is $2$.

steps.title: Apply the parallel lines rule
steps.content: Parallel lines have equal slopes. Since the graph of $y = f(x)$ is parallel to line $j$, both lines must have the same slope. The slope of line $j$ is $2$.
